summary: E2E frontend verification of dark-themed landing redesign and standalone Affiliate nav item. All 13 requested features verified — landing renders dark (#0F0F12), Products dropdown contains exactly the 5 expected items (Affiliate excluded), Affiliate nav is a standalone Router Link to /products/affiliate (tag=A, href=/products/affiliate), all 6 product pages render with hero/stats/infographic, mobile @390px has no horizontal scroll & hamburger works, /app/* routes all return 200.

issues: Recharts ResponsiveContainer emits 'width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' console warnings on initial mount. Chart still renders visibly, but warning indicates container has no resolved dimensions at first paint — likely needs minHeight or fixed height on the wrapper. Cosmetic, non-blocking.

test_results_detail.products_dropdown_5_items: PASS — items: ['1v1 Duel','Trading Royale','Multi Trader','Tag Team','Community Battles']
test_results_detail.product_pages_all_render: PASS — duel/royale/tournament/tagteam/community/affiliate all have hero-title + hero-stats + model-infographic
test_results_detail.hash_nav_from_product_page: PASS — clicking 'How it works' from /products/duel navigates back to landing
test_results_detail.productsuite_card_click: PASS — 5 product-card-* present; duel card click navigates to /products/duel

action_items: (Optional, low priority) Fix Recharts ResponsiveContainer warning on Affiliate Tree by giving parent a fixed/min height so initial measurement isn't -1.
critical_code_review_comments: ProductNav.jsx correctly differentiates href-Link items vs goto-button items via ternary — clean implementation.
Landing.jsx hash-scroll uses requestAnimationFrame which is correct for late-mounted sections.
All interactive nav elements carry data-testid — good testability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing redesign and standalone Affiliate nav are fully verified. The only minor cosmetic finding is a Recharts width/height=-1 console warning on the Affiliate Tree infographic at /products/affiliate — chart still renders but parent container needs a fixed/min height for clean initial measurement. Backend not tested (frontend-only request).
